falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,000 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and historical bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average true range (ATR) exceeds 150 points
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained volatility would invalidate the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a blowoff phase

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX index drops below 18 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extreme complacency in volatility would falsify the 'HOLD' signal's risk assumptions

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
